notes: Established under Village Code Ch. 21 (originally adopted 1961, amended 2022) pursuant to NY Village Law § 7-718. Five regular members, optional one alternate.

@graph.name: Village of Kinderhook Planning Board
@graph.description: Five-member planning board appointed pursuant to NY Village Law § 7-718. Reviews subdivision applications, site plans, and other land-use matters for the Village of Kinderhook.

parentOrganization.name: Village of Kinderhook Board of Trustees

@graph.kh:establishedBy: Village of Kinderhook Local Law (adopted 3-3-1961 as § 20-1 of the 1978 Code; codified at Ch. 21; amended 3-9-2022 by L.L. No. 1-2022).
